fields.label: Custom CSS
fields.name: custom_css
fields.instructions: Optional CSS added site-wide. Leave blank unless you know what you're doing.

fields.label: Custom JS (footer)
fields.name: custom_js
fields.instructions: Optional JavaScript / tracking snippets output before </body>. Include the <script> tags.

fields.label: Google Maps API Key
fields.name: google_maps_api_key
fields.instructions: Needed only for the interactive map field in the Locations block.
